name: ecogestos-ahc
description: Web App EcoGestos para la Asociación Huella de Carbono

scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @ecogestos/shared && npm run dev --workspace @ecogestos/backend & npm run dev --workspace @ecogestos/frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @ecogestos/shared && npm run build --workspace @ecogestos/frontend && npm run postbuild:web
scripts.build:all: npm run build --workspace @ecogestos/shared && npm run build --workspace @ecogestos/backend && npm run build --workspace @ecogestos/frontend
scripts.build:backend: npm run build --workspace @ecogestos/shared && npm run build --workspace @ecogestos/backend
scripts.lint: npm run typecheck --workspace @ecogestos/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @ecogestos/backend && npm run typecheck --workspace @ecogestos/frontend
